# discord_message (Resource)

Sends a message to a Discord channel. Create-only; recreating the resource sends a new message.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `channel_id` (String) ID of the channel to send the message to.

### Optional

- `content` (String) Message text (up to 2000 characters).
- `embed_json` (String) JSON-encoded Discord embed object. Conflicts with content.
- `tts` (Boolean) Whether the message should be read aloud by clients (text-to-speech).

### Read-Only

- `author_id` (String) ID of the user that sent the message.
- `created_at` (String) ISO timestamp when the message was sent (alias of timestamp).
- `id` (String) Snowflake ID of the sent message.
- `timestamp` (String) ISO timestamp when the message was sent.
